cases.description: Sanitized placeholder-only rich document actually opened and saved as DOCX by Microsoft Word 16, retaining real producer package behavior after a targeted core-properties privacy rewrite.

actual_producer.production_method: Opened the synthetic sanitized word_like_rich recipe and saved as DOCX with SaveAs2 format 16 in a hidden STA automation instance.

sanitization.procedure: Source content was sanitized by construction. After the producer save, only docProps/core.xml identity fields were rewritten through the raw ZIP member-preservation API; all decompressed package surfaces were then scanned.
sanitization.privacy_review: Automated member-name, member-data, member-comment, member-extra, archive-comment, local-path, and known-identity scan passed on 2026-07-23; placeholder content only.

provenance.statement: Actually saved by Microsoft Word; source content is synthetic and contains no client or proprietary template data.

cases.description: Consultant-template-shaped placeholder document actually saved by Microsoft Word 16, with branded furniture and package features but no real consultant or client content.

actual_producer.production_method: Opened the synthetic sanitized consultant_template recipe and saved as DOCX with SaveAs2 format 16 in a hidden STA automation instance.

sanitization.procedure: The template-shaped source was generated from non-client placeholders. After the producer save, only docProps/core.xml identity fields were rewritten through the raw ZIP member-preservation API; all decompressed package surfaces were then scanned.
sanitization.privacy_review: Automated member-name, member-data, member-comment, member-extra, archive-comment, local-path, and known-identity scan passed on 2026-07-23; no proprietary consultant template was used.

provenance.statement: Actually saved by Microsoft Word from a consultant-template-like synthetic source; it is not represented as an authentic consultant template.

cases.description: Placeholder-only document genuinely round-tripped through the binary Word 97-2003 .doc format and converted back to DOCX by Microsoft Word 16.

actual_producer.production_method: Opened the sanitized older_conversion_like DOCX, saved it as binary Word 97-2003 .doc with format 0, reopened that .doc, and saved the converted result as DOCX with format 16.

sanitization.procedure: Source content was sanitized by construction before the binary .doc round-trip. After DOCX conversion, only docProps/core.xml identity fields were rewritten through the raw ZIP member-preservation API; all decompressed package surfaces were then scanned.
sanitization.privacy_review: Automated member-name, member-data, member-comment, member-extra, archive-comment, local-path, and known-identity scan passed on 2026-07-23; the transient .doc contained only placeholder content and is not committed.

provenance.statement: This is an actual Word conversion from a real binary .doc intermediate generated solely from sanitized placeholder content.

cases.description: Sanitized placeholder-only rich document actually converted to ODT and then saved as DOCX by LibreOffice 26.2.4.2.

actual_producer.production_method: Converted the sanitized libreoffice_like_metadata recipe to ODT, then converted that ODT to DOCX with the Office Open XML Text filter using isolated headless soffice.

sanitization.procedure: The source was sanitized by construction before LibreOffice conversion. No package member was modified after the producer save; every decompressed package surface was scanned.
sanitization.privacy_review: Automated member-name, member-data, member-comment, member-extra, archive-comment, local-path, and known-identity scan passed on 2026-07-23; placeholder content only.

provenance.statement: Actually saved by LibreOffice from sanitized synthetic content; no post-producer ZIP canonicalization or member rewrite was performed.
